description: Pins Ed25519 sign + verify behavior. The fixed test keypair is committed below so any implementation can reproduce signatures byte-for-byte. (Ed25519 signatures are deterministic per RFC 8032 — same key + same message always produces the same signature.) Keys are PKCS#8 / raw, base64url-encoded.

vectors.name: sign-32-zero-bytes
vectors.note: Pre-hashed payload of 32 zero bytes (the shape of the signing-digest input from §8.1).

vectors.name: verify-tampered-message-fails
vectors.note: Same signature as sign-leaf-hash-A but a flipped bit in the message. Verification must return false (per docs/v1 §14 — fail closed).
